methods.description: This method involves calculating the Trophic Water Quality Index (TWQI) and the Andean Biotic Index (ABI) to assess water quality using diatom and macroinvertebrate data.

steps.description: We used the Trophic Water Quality Index (TWQI) for subtropical and temperate Brazilian lotic systems developed by Lobo et al. (2014, 2015) to diagnose water quality using the composition of epilithic diatoms.
We calculated the Andean Biotic Index (ABI), which is an adaptation of the BMWP Index, using macroinvertebrate tolerance values.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate ABI using macroinvertebrate tolerance values

methods.description: This method evaluates environmental similarity between sites and seasons using Euclidean distances and Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to analyze environmental data.

steps.description: The environmental similarity between sites and seasons was evaluated with normalized variables using Euclidean distances with an average cluster.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate environmental similarity using Euclidean distances

steps.description: The site's environmental data were analyzed with a Principal Component Analysis (PCA) of mean values for both seasons for each site.

methods.description: This method involves cluster and NMDS analyses to evaluate diatom and macroinvertebrate assemblages, and calculates diversity metrics.

steps.description: Diatom and macroinvertebrate assemblages were evaluated using cluster and Non-Metric Multidimensional Scaling (NMDS) analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cluster and NMDS analyses on assemblages

steps.description: We calculated richness, abundance, and Shannon diversity for each group (diatoms and macroinvertebrates at each site).

methods.description: This method describes the collection, preparation, and analysis of epilithic diatom samples to determine species composition and abundance.

steps.description: Epilithic diatoms were collected at each site by scrubbing the upper surface of stones using a toothbrush.
The samples were cleaned with sulfuric and hydrochloric acids and mounted on permanent slides with Naphrax®.
steps.searchable_summary: clean and mount diatom samples on slides

steps.description: To calculate the relative abundances of the species, all organisms found along random transects on the prepared permanent slides were identified and counted.
steps.searchable_summary: identify and count diatom species on slides
